title: ranunculus flabellatus proles cinerascens
intro: Ranunculus flabellatus proles cinerascens, also known as the lesser meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus flabellatus proles cinerascens include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
